title: New Baby Congratulations Card Baby Last Feed Tracker Newborn Breastfeeding Night Time Organiser Neutral Gender Gift Card Greeting Card
features: NIGHT TIME FEEDS: As all parents know, sleep deprivation can get the better of you sometimes when you have a newborn baby in the house. When your baby is upset and needs feeding, sometimes it can feel like you only fed them just 5 minutes ago! With this handy Last Feed tracker, you'll be able to tell when exactly your baby was last fed and if it is time for their next feed.

CONGRATULATIONS: This handy tracker also doubles up as a Congratulations card to gift to someone who is expecting or have a newborn. Simply write your message on the reverse, pop it in the envelope included and aid the new parents with the struggle that can be keeping track of feeding times.

BEAUTIFUL QUALITY: The Hugs & Kisses range is adorable and chic. The quality of the products featured in this brand are second to none, and each product is perfect to give as high quality gifts for any occasion.

SIMPLE DESIGN: The simple and clean design displays elegant style in this photo frame. The design features delicate drawings of hearts, rabbits and a bear. The colours presented are neutral grey, yellow and also touches of both pink and blue which makes the card unisex so even perfect as a gift if the sex of the baby is unknown.
